Provides the core analytical pipelines for CEnTR\*MAP, a workflow for
mapping the conceptual landscape of community-engaged research (CEnR).
Implements three complementary pipelines: anchoring (correspondence
analysis and PAM clustering), integration (network centrality), and
leverage (key actor classification). The package is designed to be
called from a Shiny application but works entirely from the R console.

# Package index

## Pipeline 1 — Anchoring

Identify which concepts are most central to how a community talks about
CEnR via correspondence analysis and PAM clustering.

- [`prepare_contingency_table()`](https://centrcanon.github.io/centrcanon/reference/prepare_contingency_table.md)
  : Prepare a contingency table from an edgelist
- [`run_correspondence_analysis()`](https://centrcanon.github.io/centrcanon/reference/run_correspondence_analysis.md)
  : Run correspondence analysis on a contingency table
- [`run_pam_clustering()`](https://centrcanon.github.io/centrcanon/reference/run_pam_clustering.md)
  : Run PAM clustering on CA column coordinates
- [`calculate_anchoring_score()`](https://centrcanon.github.io/centrcanon/reference/calculate_anchoring_score.md)
  : Calculate conceptual anchoring scores

## Pipeline 2 — Integration

Identify structural connectors across the concept network using a suite
of centrality measures.

- [`create_network()`](https://centrcanon.github.io/centrcanon/reference/create_network.md)
  : Create an undirected network graph from an edgelist
- [`calculate_network_metrics()`](https://centrcanon.github.io/centrcanon/reference/calculate_network_metrics.md)
  : Calculate network centrality metrics
- [`calculate_integration_score()`](https://centrcanon.github.io/centrcanon/reference/calculate_integration_score.md)
  : Calculate integration scores from network metrics

## Pipeline 3 — Leverage

Identify influential concepts and classify each node into one of eleven
leverage roles.

- [`calculate_leverage_score()`](https://centrcanon.github.io/centrcanon/reference/calculate_leverage_score.md)
  : Calculate leverage scores and classify node roles

## Utilities

Shared normalization and ranking helpers.

- [`minmax_scale()`](https://centrcanon.github.io/centrcanon/reference/minmax_scale.md)
  : Min-max scale a numeric vector
- [`dense_rank_normalize()`](https://centrcanon.github.io/centrcanon/reference/dense_rank_normalize.md)
  : Dense-rank normalize a numeric vector
- [`calculate_entropy()`](https://centrcanon.github.io/centrcanon/reference/calculate_entropy.md)
  : Normalized Shannon entropy
- [`calculate_tier()`](https://centrcanon.github.io/centrcanon/reference/calculate_tier.md)
  : Classify scores into performance tiers

## Color palettes

- [`centr_earthtone_palette()`](https://centrcanon.github.io/centrcanon/reference/centr_earthtone_palette.md)
  : Earthtone color palette for CEnTR\*MAP
- [`centr_layer_palette()`](https://centrcanon.github.io/centrcanon/reference/centr_layer_palette.md)
  : Three-layer color palette for CEnTR\*MAP analytical pipelines
